name: Allouez Park
description: Allouez Park is a place to play pickleball in Superior, WI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Carl Gullo Park
description: Come play pickleball at Carl Gullo Park in Superior, WI! There are 2 outdoor asphalt and concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Open all day, in a park.

name: Central park
description: Central park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Superior, WI. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Gordon ballfield
description: Gordon ballfield is a place to play pickleball in Gordon, WI. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Hammond Court
description: Hammond Court is a place to play pickleball in Superior, WI. There is 1 outdoor concrete and asphalt court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is free.

name: Lake Nebagamon Park
description: Come play pickleball at Lake Nebagamon Park in Lake Nebagamon, WI! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Mission Covenant Church
description: Mission Covenant Church is a place to play pickleball in Poplar, WI. There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Superior Douglas County Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Superior Douglas County Family YMCA in Superior, WI!
